name: AKS cluster network policy not configured
description: No Kubernetes NetworkPolicy engine is configured on this AKS cluster. Without a network policy engine (Azure CNI or Calico), all pods can communicate with all other pods in the cluster without restriction, enabling lateral movement after a pod compromise.
remediation: Enable a network policy engine (Azure CNI network policies or Calico) when creating or upgrading the cluster. Define NetworkPolicy resources to explicitly allow required inter-pod traffic and deny all else by default.
